steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The sentence contains the phrase architectural tourists... can easily recognize how its style draws inspiration. This shows the Spanish influence is something clearly noticeable throughout California—an observable, tangible presence.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The word palpable means easily perceived or clearly present, directly aligning with the tourists' ability to recognize the influence.

The other three choices either reverse the meaning (understated), suggest conflict (disputed), or provide irrelevant concepts (corroborated).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
